relations.note: Exclusivity rule governs selection among the three callout styles.
Exclusivity rule governs selection among the three callout styles.
Exclusivity rule governs selection among the three callout styles.

effect.reserved_for: one style per screen/section — never two of the same style competing
effect.subject: callout style

quotes: use judiciously; never two of the same style competing on one screen/section
three approved styles — use judiciously; never two of the same style competing on one screen/section

rules.intent: Prevent visual redundancy and preserve callout hierarchy.
rules.rule_text: There are three approved callout styles; use them judiciously and never let two of the same style compete on one screen/section.

quotes: Bold **Brand Blue (#00529b)** text with **Gold (#ffc60a)** horizontal rules above and below. Centered text.
rule weight 2px, rule width ≈ 60–100% of text block, 16px padding between rule and text
**Main callout (key point):** Bold **Brand Blue (#00529b)** text with **Gold (#ffc60a)** horizontal rules above and below. Centered text.
rule weight 2px, rule width ≈ 60–100% of text block, 16px padding between rule and text

rules.rule_text: The Main callout (key point) uses bold Brand Blue (#00529b) text with Gold (#ffc60a) horizontal rules above and below, centered (callout.main.alignment). Rules are 2px weight (border.main_callout.gold_rule_2px), width ≈ 60–100% of the text block, with 16px padding between rule and text (padding.main_callout.rule_text_16).

quotes: **Light Blue (#E6F0F9) box at 70% tint** with **Bold Brand Blue** text
20px internal padding, corner radius per accent-shape rules §2.5
**Secondary/data callout:** **Light Blue (#E6F0F9) box at 70% tint** with **Bold Brand Blue** text; may include one line icon (e.g., 1x pill icon).
20px internal padding, corner radius per accent-shape rules §2.5

rules.rule_text: The Secondary/data callout is a Light Blue (#E6F0F9) box at 70% tint (callout.data.fill.opacity = 0.7) with Bold Brand Blue (#00529b) text; it may include one line icon (e.g., 1x pill icon). Internal padding is 20px (callout.data.padding) and corner radius follows the accent-shape rules §2.5.

quotes: **Golden Sand (#FEF1C8) box at 30% tint**, **Bold Brand Blue headline**, line icons, **Bold Sky Blue (#358CCB) subheads**, **Regular Graphite (#212121) body text**.
24px internal padding; two-column icon+text layout collapses to single column on mobile

**Text-heavy callout (lists/descriptions):** **Golden Sand (#FEF1C8) box at 30% tint**, **Bold Brand Blue headline**, line icons, **Bold Sky Blue (#358CCB) subheads**, **Regular Graphite (#212121) body text**.
24px internal padding; two-column icon+text layout collapses to single column on mobile

rules.intent: Standardize the text-heavy/list callout treatment and its responsive behavior.
rules.rule_text: The Text-heavy callout (lists/descriptions) is a Golden Sand (#FEF1C8) box at 30% tint (callout.text_heavy.fill.opacity = 0.3) with a Bold Brand Blue (#00529b) headline, line icons, Bold Sky Blue (#358CCB) subheads, and Regular Graphite (#212121) body text. Internal padding is 24px (callout.text_heavy.padding); its two-column icon+text layout collapses to a single column on mobile.
